title: Jbennett
compiled_truth: Jbennett is an external contact at [Gmssr](companies/gmssr). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-21), Jbennett sent 121 and received 235 emails, totalling 356 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jdasovic](people/jdasovic) (78), [Harry Kingerski](people/harry-kingerski) (73), [Smara](people/smara) (56), [Tjohnso8](people/tjohnso8) (42), [James D Steffes](people/james-d-steffes) (39).
